specific_question: How many customer service inquiries came in outside business hours in December 2024?
answer: In December 2024, MediConn Solutions' IT data report found that 23% of customer inquiries arrived outside business hours and were 50% handled by the automated system and next-day response queue.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
